{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231247840A8A70E6C91F7C13F5"}"},"total":117},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614469493179712280","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"👍这本小说简直是文学世界里的一颗璀璨明珠！从开篇那引人入胜的场景设定，就像一把钩子，牢牢地抓住了读者的心，让人迫不及待地想要深入其中。
💫作者的文字功底深厚得令人惊叹，细腻的描写如同涓涓细流，淌过每一个情节，无论是人物的一颦一笑，还是环境的一草一木，都仿佛跃然纸上，鲜活而生动。
🌟故事情节更是跌宕起伏，峰回路转之处，常常让我忍不住拍案叫绝。每一个转折都出乎意料却又在情理之中，就像一场精心编排的魔术，不断给人带来惊喜与震撼。
🤩书中的人物形象塑造堪称一绝，他们不是平面的、刻板的，而是有血有肉、性格鲜明的个体。主角的坚韧不拔、配角的各具特色，相互交织，共同演绎出一场精彩绝伦的人性之歌
牛逼作者！牛逼！！！[大笑][大笑][大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772884188,"group_id":"7556614733915229208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+3DPxl0OjKqxH7hyVd3KObH86lSg1PYX5to1GpONsuj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4830e850d1f747d089a198925da169ce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623084&x-signature=c8kwYHFVGGYIfp3PEBQ9igNk95A%3D","user_id":"3856728091802691","user_name":"风烟༽成雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3856728091802691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556614733915229208","book_info":{"abstract":"［多女主］［无敌］［无系统］［不跟剧情］
本书又名:《懒得思考，究极生物飞升提瓦特》
“出来混，一定要记得三件事！”
“哪三件？”
“忘本，背刺，出卖兄弟！”
……
后入卡兹，成为jo级生物，享受不老不死的完美身躯以及荣华富贵，却在觉醒替身之时再次穿越！
我重生了…这一世，我白松一定要！
好好享受！
“不老不死的身躯！
无敌的力量！
And
四蛋都怕我！”
……
提瓦特大陆的第5位降临者，拥有真正能够颠覆世界的力量！会为这个世界带来毁灭还是新生？
三月共选，奇迹再现！
时空错位，超越命运！
……
［身怀力量，也不能心存侥幸！］

27,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21835,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":2556},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772884548,"author_reply_time":1772884577,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610079591595606846","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评，假期团聚就上千星奇域法尔伽应约而来捕风的归客五星命之座免费拿已逝去的末日，永恒绿洲的记忆，居尔城的记忆。比勒琪丝的哀歌那叫浩劫先锋吧？那一年的雪花飘落梅花开枝头流淌吧…过往的刀光。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771861213,"group_id":"7556614733915229208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxeRlhRhN1JF6SCMLOOIgQk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9c8de3333a134afd8d5e4ef2feeeddde~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618348&x-signature=Ic%2Fqk1QUtLfNVpErAn%2FvVY7Emy8%3D","user_id":"110367684703119","user_name":"模拟2024"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110367684703119","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661272819,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556614733915229208","book_info":{"abstract":"［多女主］［无敌］［无系统］［不跟剧情］
